creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Jean-Sébastien Pédron from comment #8)

> I think I will go with the `USE_GCC=12` option. Is it ok to set it for FreeBSD 12.x only?
> 
> The incompatibility seems to come from FreeBSD 12's libcxx and its headers to me, not from darktable.

Sure it is ok to set it for FreeBSD 12 only. Actually, I think it is even better, as long as it is an issue affecting FreeBSD 12 only. Please test it carefully.
